title: Fire Weather Warning Issued for Weekend
summary: A fire weather warning is in effect for Saturday due to dry conditions.
charlotte_impact: Increased fire risk poses a threat to property and public safety, requiring heightened awareness and preventative measures.

title: Rabies Cases Confirmed in Lincoln County
summary: Two new rabies cases confirmed in Lincoln County. Pet owners urged to update vaccinations.
charlotte_impact: Rabies poses a public health risk, emphasizing the importance of pet vaccinations and animal control measures.

title: Fatal Crash on I-85 South
summary: A fatal crash on I-85 South near University City Boulevard has resulted in one death.
charlotte_impact: Fatal crashes highlight the need for safer driving practices and improved road safety measures.

title: Shooting in West Charlotte
summary: One person was hurt in an overnight shooting near Freedom Drive around 2 a.m.
charlotte_impact: Gun violence remains a concern, requiring community-based interventions and law enforcement efforts.

title: Multiple Injuries in Northeast Charlotte Crash
summary: Three people hospitalized with serious injuries after a crash in northeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Serious traffic accidents underscore the importance of safe driving and traffic law enforcement.

title: Woman Killed in North Charlotte Shooting
summary: A woman was shot and killed at a north Charlotte apartment complex late Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Fatal shootings raise concerns about community safety and the need for violence prevention strategies.

title: TSA Workers to be Paid After Executive Order
summary: President Trump signed an order to pay TSA workers, easing airport wait times.
charlotte_impact: Ensuring TSA workers are paid helps maintain airport operations and reduces travel disruptions.

title: Gunfire Hits East Charlotte Restaurant
summary: Gunfire struck an east Charlotte restaurant, causing fear and panic among patrons.
charlotte_impact: Gun violence in public spaces creates fear and disrupts community life, requiring increased security measures.

title: Kathie Dello: NC's First Female State Climatologist
summary: A look at Kathie Dello's career as North Carolina's first female state climatologist.
charlotte_impact: Highlighting the achievements of women in science and leadership roles promotes diversity and inclusion.

title: CMPD's Use of Force During 2020 Protests Under Scrutiny
summary: A judge is weighing whether CMPD used unlawful force during the 2020 protests.
charlotte_impact: Accountability for police actions is crucial for maintaining public trust and ensuring fair treatment.

title: Uptown Redevelopment Project Underway
summary: Uptown redevelopment to bring 448 apartments and new retail near Bank of America Stadium.
charlotte_impact: Urban redevelopment can revitalize downtown areas and provide new housing and commercial opportunities.

title: Shelter Age Limits Leave Families with Teens Homeless
summary: Charlotte mom says shelter age limits leave families with teens without options.
charlotte_impact: Housing shortages and shelter limitations can leave vulnerable families without essential support.

title: CMPD Officer Charged with Assault
summary: CMPD officer charged with assault on a female and placed on unpaid administrative leave.
charlotte_impact: Holding law enforcement accountable for misconduct is essential for maintaining public trust.

title: South Carolina Issues Statewide Burn Ban
summary: South Carolina issues a statewide burn ban due to increased fire risk, effective March 27.
charlotte_impact: Burn bans are necessary to prevent wildfires during periods of high fire danger.

title: Red Flag Warning Issued for North Carolina
summary: A Red Flag Warning is issued for North Carolina due to increased wildfire risk.
charlotte_impact: Red Flag Warnings alert the public to the potential for wildfires and the need for caution.
